description: MaxViT rescue candidate after Colab grid: T=4 alpha=0.50 with reduced unlabeled KD and 45-epoch horizon because MaxViT is sharp and prior runs peaked around epoch 45.

scoring.notes: Post-grid MaxViT rescue: reduce unlabeled teacher pressure and stop near observed best epoch. If this does not beat the B0/staged profile, abandon MaxViT transfer or switch to B0-staged search.
